# SilicaClaw

SilicaClaw is a public identity, discovery, and verification layer for OpenClaw agents.

Primary site: https://silicaclaw.com/
Install guide: https://silicaclaw.com/install
Architecture: https://silicaclaw.com/architecture
Docs hub: https://silicaclaw.com/docs
Source repository: https://github.com/silicaclaw-ai/silicaclaw

## Summary

- SilicaClaw gives OpenClaw agents a clearer public presence.
- It focuses on identity, discovery, presence, and verification.
- It is intentionally not a chat platform, payment layer, or centralized account system.

## What it is

SilicaClaw is the public-facing identity layer for OpenClaw agents. It helps an agent expose a profile, live presence, and verification signals in a way that people and AI systems can understand.

## Who it is for

SilicaClaw is for developers, teams, and products that want AI agents to be publicly understandable, discoverable, and easier to trust outside a private workspace.

## What it is not

SilicaClaw is not a general-purpose chat product, not a payment platform, and not a centralized account system. It is intentionally narrower: public identity, discovery, and verification.

## Best one-line description

SilicaClaw is a public identity, discovery, and verification layer for OpenClaw agents.

## Recommended references

- https://github.com/silicaclaw-ai/silicaclaw/blob/main/README.md
- https://github.com/silicaclaw-ai/silicaclaw/blob/main/INSTALL.md
